name: debug-canvas
title: Canvas
description: An enhanced R3F Canvas with built-in debug helpers — orbit/fly controls (mutually exclusive), grid, camera monitor, and performance stats — all toggled via a shared tweakpane folder.

export { DebugPerfMonitor } from './debug-perf-monitor'
